methods.description: Examination of the holotype specimen of Arrhinolemur scalabrinii to assess its preservation and anatomical features.

steps.description: The holotype and only known specimen of Arrhinolemur scalabrinii was examined in MACN (Museo Argentino de Ciencias Naturales 'Bernardino Rivadavia', Buenos Aires).
steps.searchable_summary: Examine the holotype specimen at MACN for anatomical features.
outputs: Detailed observations of the specimen's preservation and anatomical features

methods.description: Assessment of the phylogenetic position of Arrhinolemur scalabrinii using morphological data and parsimony analysis.

steps.description: The phylogenetic position of Arrhinolemur scalabrinii was assessed in the context of a recent morphological phylogenetic analysis of the Anostomidae.
steps.searchable_summary: Assess phylogenetic position using morphological data.

steps.description: The data matrix was constructed in Mesquite v. 2.74.
Phylogenetic analysis in PAUP* 4.0 Beta 10 employed parsimony with 1000 heuristic searches.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform parsimony analysis with heuristic searches in PAUP*.

steps.description: The tree was explored and edited in Archaeopteryx 0.968 beta.
steps.searchable_summary: Visualize and edit phylogenetic tree in Archaeopteryx.
